description: You are a high school geometry teacher creating an interactive proof demonstration for the SAS Triangle Similarity Theorem (Common Core Standard G-SRT.5). Construct triangle ABC with vertices A(0,0), B(4,0), and C(2,3). Create triangle A'B'C' by dilating triangle ABC from the origin with a scale factor of 1.5. Display the measurements of all six side lengths and the ratios of corresponding sides (A'B'/AB, B'C'/BC, and A'C'/AC). Include a text element stating the scale factor and the similarity relationship. Save the construction to ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/triangle_similarity.ggb.
